rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax and ensure all identifiers are visible in the current scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope and type consistency when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL expectations: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions and equation declarations.
Stateful equations should use initialized recurrence; branching logic uses nested if-then-else.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
Do not invent new identifiers or types not visible in the current AADL scope.
irrelevant_topics: model repair and minimal fix patterns
